name: Board Read
description: Read the kanban board for the current project — returns tasks grouped by status column (pending, queued, running, paused, completed, failed) with priority and blocked_by fields. Pass project_id to target a specific project.

args.name: project_id
args.description: Target project ID (defaults to the chat's current project).

args.name: filter_by_agent
args.description: Return only tasks assigned to this agent ID.
